vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không bao giờ thỏa mãn
vocab.example: As a child, I had an insatiable curiosity about insects, often spending hours in the garden observing them.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm thông qua xúc giác (chạm, cầm nắm)
vocab.example: Working with clay was a wonderful tactile experience that helped me develop my fine motor skills.
My boundless imagination allowed me to turn simple cardboard boxes into elaborate spaceships.
I used to spend my idle hours sketching portraits of my family members in a tattered notebook.
Playing chess at a young age played a crucial role in my cognitive development and strategic thinking.

vocab.meaning: những nỗ lực/hoạt động nghệ thuật
vocab.example: My parents were always very supportive of my various artistic endeavors, from finger painting to pottery.
I happened to stumble upon an old coin collection in the attic, which sparked a lifelong interest in numismatics.
Gardening was a wholesome pastime that taught me the value of patience and nurturing life.
Building model airplanes was a hobby that really helped foster creativity and attention to detail.
Participating in team sports had a profound impact on my ability to collaborate and communicate with others.
